Package org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck

Class InferredTypeEnvironment

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck.TypeEnvironment
org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck.TypeEnvironmentBuilder
org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck.InferredTypeEnvironment
All Implemented Interfaces:
IInferredTypeEnvironment, ITypeEnvironment, ITypeEnvironmentBuilder
public class InferredTypeEnvironment extends TypeEnvironmentBuilder implements IInferredTypeEnvironment
Here we reuse the implementation of type environments, just adding the necessary machinery to take into account an initial type environment.

    • isTranslatable

      public final boolean isTranslatable(FormulaFactory fac)
      Description copied from interface: ITypeEnvironment
      Tells whether this type environment can be translated to the given formula factory. This method therefore implements the precondition of the translation method.

      This type environment is translatable to the given factory if

      • no name of this type environment becomes a reserved word;
      • all types of this type environment can be translated.

      Specified by:
      isTranslatable in interface IInferredTypeEnvironment
      Specified by:
      isTranslatable in interface ITypeEnvironment
      Overrides:
      isTranslatable in class TypeEnvironment
      Parameters:
      fac - the target formula factory
      Returns:
      true iff a call to ITypeEnvironment.translate(FormulaFactory) would succeed

    • translate

      public IInferredTypeEnvironment translate(FormulaFactory fac)
      Description copied from interface: ITypeEnvironment
      Returns a copy of this type environment built with the given formula factory.

      If the factory of this type environment and the given factory are the same, then this type environment is returned, rather than an identical copy of it. Otherwise a new type environment object is built.

      Calling this method when ITypeEnvironment.isTranslatable(FormulaFactory) returns false will raise an IllegalArgumentException.

      Specified by:
      translate in interface IInferredTypeEnvironment
      Specified by:
      translate in interface ITypeEnvironment
      Specified by:
      translate in interface ITypeEnvironmentBuilder
      Overrides:
      translate in class TypeEnvironmentBuilder
      Parameters:
      fac - the target formula factory
      Returns:
      an equivalent type environment built with the given factory
